column1: # The Hollow — subclass cards (L3 + L9 for The Empty and The Shell)

column3: Unspool from the space you occupied and condense somewhere the battle was not watching. Move up to your speed; you cannot be targeted by reactions triggered by that movement.
A target calls on a blessing, buff, or resonance link and finds only you listening. Strip one active positive effect from an enemy within sight; they cannot reapply it this round.

Strike with a hand that leaves no signature. Deal VEIL + RESONANCE damage; the target loses track of you — they cannot target you with single-target attacks until they are struck by an ally or act twice.
Passive: where you stand, readings fail. Enemies adjacent to you lose any bonus gained from flanking, marking, or target-tracking effects; scrying and remote-sensing cannot locate you.
Reaction: the Shell answers before the mind notices the blade. When hit, reduce the incoming damage by FRAME + VEIL and redirect a fraction to the attacker if they are within reach.
The body keeps its routines even when you do not. Deal FRAME + RESONANCE damage; this card may be played while you are Stunned, Dazed, or otherwise unable to act.
A single looped routine: step, pivot, strike. Move up to your speed and make one basic attack as part of the same action; the movement does not provoke reactions.

Passive: there is no mind at the helm to bend. You are immune to Fear, Charm, Confusion, and any effect that targets intent or will; effects that require you to ""choose"" resolve as if you had chosen nothing.
Open a door onto nothing in the shape of an incoming harm. Negate one attack, spell, or effect targeting you or an ally within 15 feet; the source suffers Expose 4 as the nothing looks back.

Leave a void-shadow where your body stood and step out of the scene entirely. Until your next turn you do not exist on the battlefield; enemies resolve their actions against the shadow, then you reappear in any space within 25 feet and deal VEIL + RESONANCE damage to one adjacent enemy.

Hand the controls to the body and watch. The Shell takes two full autonomous actions on your next turn at no AP cost, chosen by you now; while running, you cannot be mind-read, interrogated, or compelled.

When your HP would drop to 0, the Shell does not notice. Remain standing with 1 HP for one full round; during that round you cannot be reduced below 1 HP and your attacks deal FRAME + RESONANCE bonus damage. At the end of the round, fall.
